title: Signed export
description: Add the observing location and coordinates to create a shareable print of this star-annotated photograph. Field of view {{field}}.

strip.label: Include signature strip
strip.description: Adds a dark footer with location, coordinates, and stats.

hints.default: Both location and coordinates are optional — anything filled in is stamped at the bottom of the image.
hints.geoUnsupported: This device does not support geolocation
hints.geoFailed: Location lookup failed, please try again
hints.videoUnsupported: Video export requires a modern browser (Chrome, Edge, or Safari 16.4+).
